title: Der's Smooth Shaded Font (Faithful 32x)
description: 11'000+ Shaded Characters | Hypixel Skyblock & Wynncraft Support | Languages | Styles | Fixes | The most advanced smooth shaded font | MC 1.6.1-26.2+
body:
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a97cd6790e8e999473a7133c990e17681889859.png)
![Overview Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cc950316580e84db1206f2e4c492cbb23734882.png)
This resourcepack simply modifies [Faithful 32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x)'s font by adding targeted colored shading to the lower parts of its characters, giving the game a more refreshing/visually appealing look! Supports **11,000+** characters, various languages, many symbols and is available for a wide range of game versions!

_**Note:** This pack has various (former) shading styles, check them out in the gallery! Only the latest release style is showcased here._

**Got an idea for a new feature or is something missing?** [[Quick Suggest it here]](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf4II1LKKFv0HCUAZi-AKDOBs82iTWvHbSRCeQX9Qngbvqc1Q/viewform?usp=dialog)

<details>
<summary>Version Helper / "Help me pick a version!"</summary>

**Visual Styles**
- Reshaded (current): **v10.1+**
- Classic (more color): **v1-v8, v13-legacy**
- Vibrant (saturated): **v10 only**
- Rose-tinted: **v9.1-9.2**
- Light Greenish: **v9.1-9.2**
- Grayscale: **v9.1-9.2**
- Opal/Pastel-rainbow: **v9.1-9.2**
- Subtle Default Gradient: **v9 only**

**Functionality**
- No Shaded Illager Glyphs: **v1, v2 & v16**
- Wynncraft Tooltips: **v13+**
- Hypixel/General Symbols: **v11+** _(v12+ recommended)_
- More Languages/Unicode: **v11+** _(v12+ recommended)_
- Shaded enchanting particles: **v17+**
- Respackopts Mod Options: **v9.x only**

_Game version support can be filtered in the versions tab.
Unsupported game versions may (mostly) work but expect a few things to break._

</details>

![Features Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e35b506d05af673d5b2b9db442f65df6be0118a0.png)
**All of Faithful 32x's font is currently supported and shaded, consisting of:**
- **ascii.png**: Most-used characters and some other symbols
- **ascii_sga.png**: Standard Galactic Alphabet used for enchanting
- **asciillager.png**: Secret characters only illagers may understand
- **accented.png**: Versions of letters with accents, diacritics, ligatures and circled numbers/letters
- **nonlatin_european.png**: Accented characters, miscellaneous symbols, some non-european characters, latin script characters

**Beyond that, the latest releases also added:** 
- **8,500+** shaded glyphs across 37 unicode pages
- **Extensive** language & symbol support
- **Vanilla fixes** for incorrect glyph widths like for "▚"
- Support for popular servers like **Hypixel** (symbols) and **Wynncraft** (tooltips)

![Questions Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2794fd0e2cd6a73f8a77bfaa36bf030b14fb8fc2.png)
**Q1**: May I use this for my modpack?

**A1**: Feel free to include it in your modpacks on Curseforge and Modrinth! If you are using it as a content creator, giving credit by linking to this project's page in your content's description is highly appreciated!

***
**Q2**: What are editions?

**A2**: Editions were used to group game versions, indicated by a letter at the end of the pack's name, ex.: (C) for Copper Edition, supporting MC 1.18+, including the files shown in the table of editions (gallery). **v10+ no longer uses editions** as there is only one file for MC 1.16+ now.

***
**Q3**: What are shading styles?

**A3**: Shading styles used to provide variety in the font's appearance. v9.2 needs the [Respackopts](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fmodrinth.com%252fmod%252frespackopts) mod to access all styles (pair with [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) if on forge). Standalone versions for each style, ex.: "Rose" (pink tint) are also available, not needing any mods. **v10+ no longer has multiple shading styles** nor needs any mods.

***
**Q4:** How do I tell **Der's Shaded Font** apart from other shaded fonts?

**A4:** Last time I checked, this one was the only smooth shaded font that supported anything other than just ascii.png characters (see features section for details). Symbols, accented characters and otherwise special characters with shading are most likely from here as well as any of the exclusive colored shading styles.

***
**Q5**: Why do a few special characters/symbols look double-struck when bold?

**A5**: Those (usually thin) characters appear as [double-struck/outline](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-197500) due to Minecraft applying the same bolding method (duplicating and shifting by two pixels) across the board. Resourcepacks are limited in this regard as they cannot adjust said method. Affected glyphs are no longer shaded so that you shouldn't encounter any issues.

***
[Click here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shaded-font-plus) for a 16x version! / [Submit feedback](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfpLF-RLC95utvtUaEm9pXmwhpzo3kRg8XpJ-BFcLcI7ZnXAQ/viewform?usp=dialog)
